name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
department: Department of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
benefits: ₹6000 per year in three equal installments of ₹2000 directly credited to bank accounts.
required_documents: Aadhaar Card, Land Registry Documents, Bank Passbook, Mobile Number
description: A Central Sector Scheme to provide income support to all landholding farmers' families across the country to enable them to take care of agricultural expenses.

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana (SSY)
benefits: Attractive interest rate (8.2% annually) with triple tax exemptions (EEE status) under Section 80C.
required_documents: Birth Certificate of Girl Child, Aadhaar Card of Parent, PAN Card of Parent, Address Proof
description: A small savings scheme for girl children launched as part of the 'Beti Bachao Beti Padhao' campaign to meet their education and marriage expenses.

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana (PMAY)
department: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
benefits: Interest subsidy of up to 6.5% on housing loans for EWS/LIG categories resulting in savings up to ₹2.67 Lakhs.
required_documents: Aadhaar Card, Income Certificate, BPL Card/Certificate, Bank Account Details, Domicile Proof
description: An initiative by the Government of India to provide affordable housing for the urban and rural poor by the year 2022 and beyond.

name: Post Matric Scholarship Scheme
department: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
benefits: 100% tuition fee reimbursement and monthly maintenance allowance depending on course of study.
required_documents: Aadhaar Card, Caste Certificate, Income Certificate, Previous Exam Marksheet, Bank Passbook, Domicile Proof
description: Financial assistance to Scheduled Caste (SC) and OBC students pursuing post-matriculation or post-secondary courses to reduce dropouts.

name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
benefits: Accidental death and full disability coverage of ₹2 Lakh; partial disability coverage of ₹1 Lakh for ₹20/year premium.
required_documents: Aadhaar Card, Bank Passbook details, Consent-cum-Declaration form
description: An accident insurance scheme offering high coverage at a highly subsidized premium, available to people in the age group of 18 to 70 years.

name: Atal Pension Yojana (APY)
benefits: Guaranteed minimum pension of ₹1000 to ₹5000 per month after attaining 60 years of age based on contribution.
required_documents: Aadhaar Card, Savings Bank Account, Mobile Number
description: A pension scheme focused on the unorganized sector workers to provide social security and financial protection in old age.

name: Pradhan Mantri Mudra Yojana (PMMY)
benefits: Collateral-free loans up to ₹10 Lakh for non-farm micro/small enterprises under Shishu (up to ₹50k) Kishor (up to ₹5L) and Tarun (up to ₹10L).
required_documents: Aadhaar Card, PAN Card, Business Address Proof, Quotation of Machinery, Business Plan
description: Provides funding support of up to ₹10 Lakhs to non-corporate, non-farm small and micro enterprises to boost entrepreneurship.

name: Stand-Up India Scheme
department: Small Industries Development Bank of India
benefits: Bank loans between ₹10 Lakh and ₹1 Crore for setting up a greenfield enterprise in manufacturing, services, or trading.
required_documents: Aadhaar Card, Caste Certificate (SC/ST), Business Project Report, Last 3 Years Balance Sheet, Income Tax Returns
description: Promotes entrepreneurship among women and SC/ST communities by facilitating bank loans for setting up greenfield enterprises.

name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS)
benefits: Monthly pension of ₹200 for ages 60-79 and ₹500 for age 80+ to support basic living expenses.
required_documents: Aadhaar Card, BPL Card, Age Proof Certificate, Bank Passbook, Domicile Proof
description: Under NSAP, this scheme provides financial assistance/pensions to elderly citizens belonging to Below Poverty Line (BPL) households.

name: MGNREGA (Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee)
benefits: Guaranteed 100 days of unskilled wage employment per financial year to rural households within 15 km of residence.
required_documents: Aadhaar Card, Job Card, Bank Passbook, Passport Size Photograph
description: A social security measure that guarantees the right to work, providing livelihood security to rural households by offering unskilled manual labor.

name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
benefits: Basic savings bank account with zero balance, free RuPay debit card, ₹2 Lakh accident insurance, and ₹10000 overdraft facility.
required_documents: Aadhaar Card or Voter ID or Driving License, Passport Size Photograph
description: National Mission for Financial Inclusion to ensure access to financial services namely banking savings deposit accounts, credit, and insurance.

name: Sanjay Gandhi Niradhar Grant Scheme
benefits: Monthly pension of ₹1500 to destitute, disabled, widows, and persons suffering from major/critical illnesses.
required_documents: Aadhaar Card, Age Certificate, Income Certificate (up to ₹21000), Disability Certificate, Maharashtra Domicile
description: Financial aid provided by the Maharashtra State Government to disabled persons, widows, and destitute citizens who have no source of income.
